name: 15q25_PTPN9_SD
description: 15q25 region encompassing PTPN9, ADAMTSL3, CHRNA3/CHRNA5/CHRNB4 nicotinic-receptor cluster, and IREB2. Intra-chromosomal SDs (5-30 kb at 93-97% identity) flank the CHRNA cluster and PTPN9, contributing to rare ~0.5-2 Mb microdeletions. CHRNA5 GWAS signal for nicotine dependence and lung cancer is located here.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-30 kb SD pairs at 93-97% identity flanking PTPN9 and the CHRNA cluster; Alu-rich intervening segments.
